g.text: FABIO taxes less subsidies per item for Albania (ALB) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank
reference is TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. No external strand benchmark covers this country. Items
grouped as "Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB across years). Rows: primary
FABIO taxes less subsidies [EXIOBASE] — Albania (ALB) (value-added sub-account)
Taxes less subsidies on production (current US$)
